subject: 🚀 Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
body:

Pro.<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvwfkwkjszGgntF6cYbLWt8uC8sy4X9GANL8yf57VpfJg5b3EDe74mGQBjWEv5mfI_uKg13L21zFPkRj7Z04Z4vV11bsFUddVcE02SFhcuRXJP0JsmD8xy7BqLVAiZfgtyXBeiVosWNUxJ5uNmcQ9__Gfu1FQzJzQ8xCh5IK-UU7JbqTCMDV-nMVTWprGX5ByoiJzFPMQkbhmWz20Lj3gS2Aw>

A smarter model for your most complex tasks

Try Gemini 3.1  
Pro<https://c.gle/AEJ26qtyx-hCX6tewRs1bvZkWIMVhXpEeCgAVw-GR7KuVH5F6FfEVy2oSW1kZeY3EbNLiasDZQYTCZ1PBxopmCLAablJYiztAai3Qq36JP-DMnjOZZAiUmgVwTQSjCXVi8tE7BMR8m4LHo2E-1Z2oDyBt7RhsUgLRzhY1p2T4iNQZ0rD5-rJDollemH4EyJuHw0RhOpUBD_11gMCMgzIahs>

Hi Denys,

Building on the Gemini 3 series, 3.1 Pro enhances core reasoning to provide  
a smarter, more capable baseline for complex problem-solving. On ARC-AGI-2,  
a benchmark that evaluates a model’s ability to solve entirely new logic  
patterns, 3.1 Pro achieves more than  
double<https://c.gle/AEJ26quNxEnLjnQBRYrcFf3oRQtXXIJ8848DvQ7mQlaSHZciAvDNF8HMIAwxD5F8ZruGfLGipxxk-Cm73TuTNVYyBXu0rVNAlwwuAJQgArMklAnmq44BLjBF8BuCNGBZiijimI_k4pjfguEyaNzEx-yaoBZM7z8OgSLHn9ASr7JFSDhiuPR-ODInyBKHPIeE39lWGNRJw4lrI6CxQf27i31TPce2mx1dod4x>  
the reasoning performance of 3 Pro.

Practical, real-world applications of Gemini 3.1 Pro include:

- Creative coding &  
animation<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvgfsa6cNk4DzVjad9cxJdKLR4-vQCWG8kQ_m_6iosdr42kaUVKYl8oAGOhpxEqPrMHU0Y3gC92_1rdNOhE-GbLl3Jr4cdX7pucLzimyEO_ezMTkH_yOV78p4dbgJoOpvj8o7okRUpxPjINvLMJsZ0g5BN8uRbOg13URWgtGnQvdyxWmj555sybfJ9stfVYdnkg__GbalvFA1CT3a2lFw>:  
Turn creative ideas into functional code for modern websites and generate  
web-ready animated SVGs from a text prompt.

- Interactive  
design<https://c.gle/AEJ26qt6d6B03NW6tZTEnWPoNTbFfhsHPJqiQu2zgl4tRNSklk0rlmK20wQYCB0qnfn_XgJ_JOzyQt26C3AUCXqxKDtdJ3hVVq2dNM1fn_lBKLwxyR0OMtAxmcl7F6IYUZKnSDtrL7lNkldAgACemHgyCVH9pFPC3N_qtzLVt39abY-TVsE7RP-0d26haYa3mraxX8KVs7BCTQ>:  
Code complex 3D simulations to help designers and researchers quickly build  
sensory-rich user interfaces.

- System  
synthesis<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvKRBuHcIY-r1PtFnMzXQnv4oqd8z5jAv8vM0dRKakZrXX_xCjRTfSmzsKR9DJdA5V6J52-jTTcJMjCAJgUDHMULRynkfx2PcQ4L0aKC00xbzi15fF1lAwk7NgicFRC2fhIjdTYU9GVhJ0H7u5tcWHqZXjN-rniBwlAD0Rcx65qqxd8Sn3vbdFKsRefO88doVHdaMc>:  
Effortlessly connect complicated APIs with user-friendly front-end designs.

Action required: Gemini 3 Pro Preview will be discontinued on March 9, 2026  
in favor of the new model. Please upgrade to Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview  
beforehand to prevent any service disruption. Additionally, on March 6,  
2026, we will switch the gemini-pro-latest alias to point to the new 3.1  
Pro model.

Start building with Gemini 3.1 Pro

You can use our SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Go, or make a direct REST  
API call with cURL. Get your paid API  
key<https://c.gle/AEJ26qt8ruy7FAfqXTZE4ZJEmTgOxbfPLMWOZw6mqQ9FsY2pCKG2PZ3fPjmm43bTB0IlH6DGoz-U3Amwqx5KD3PAVF430IACrLnfJXa0JvrLbesSxzL4VHBiff1lWXqqtBPsRrN-k8tTcoOvPFCUuJy3ivKiNMNVQezp66U>  
and start building.

from google import genai

client = genai.Client()

prompt = "Find the race condition in this C++ snippet: [code here]"

response = client.models.generate_content(

model="gemini-3.1-pro-preview",

contents=prompt

)

print(response.text)

To improve performance for workloads that use custom tools, such as file  
manipulation and shell-equivalent commands, a separate endpoint is  
available: gemini-3.1-pro-preview-customtools.

Ready to build?

Documentation<https://c.gle/AEJ26qvB9oZcpbgcu7uVnbFNVKCWzSgy2qjsFtCZEIJy-M1hX466aXE62v9yTTdmzCQSc7vgdhXai7ucODyGDANpA7DOqKHh0OYgM_qsQsbXa_jD6yzjBXuNKxvmN7axOuu3o9NSxDTxxHGKNYXWq_emBI3RWKEKEjfZV4DPbljroc74>

Remember to upgrade your applications using Gemini 3 Pro Preview before

The Google AI Studio team
